title: Bill of Rights 1688 — English Constitutional Rights and Liberties
description: Imperial Act establishing foundational constitutional rights and liberties, including prohibitions on arbitrary taxation, standing armies, and limits on executive power without parliamentary consent. Foundational legal document for Commonwealth governance frameworks.
